Telnyx Webhook Replay Detection Bypass via Base64 Signature Re-encoding

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: narrow
- Normalized severity: low
- Assessment: Shipped v2026.3.28 replay hashing treated equivalent Telnyx Base64/Base64URL signatures as distinct requests, but signature verification still held, so lower to low.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `ad77666054651c1fd77b1dc60fd6a8db6600a29a` — 2026-03-30T20:01:43+01:00

## Release Process Note
- The fix is already present in released version `2026.3.31`.
- This draft looks ready for final maintainer disposition or publication, not additional code-fix work.

OpenClaw thanks @AntAISecurityLab for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0033, "percentile": 0.24646}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-37v6-fxx8-xjmx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T02:58:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-37v6-fxx8-xjmx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-37v6-fxx8-xjmx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41351"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-03T02:58:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-37v6-fxx8-xjmx", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/ad77666054651c1fd77b1dc60fd6a8db6600a29a", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41351", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-webhook-replay-detection-bypass-via-base64-signature-re-encoding", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-37v6-fxx8-xjmx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-37v6-fxx8-xjmx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Telnyx Webhook Replay Detection Bypass via Base64 Signature Re-encoding", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:25:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-37v6-fxx8-xjmx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
